transit.header: The bus stop at River St @ Fairmont St (inbound) will be permanently closed beginning Tuesday, May 26. Riders can instead board at River St @ Kelly Road or at River St opposite Blackstone St.
Green Line C trains will not stop at Tappan Street through Sunday, June 21, due to infrastructure upgrades. Riders can board or exit one stop away, at either Washington Square or Dean Road.
transit.description: Tappan Street will remain closed in the outbound direction only (toward Cleveland Circle) from June 22 through July 10.

transit.header: Outbound Green Line C trains (toward Cleveland Circle) will not stop at Tappan Street from Saturday, June 13 through Friday, July 10, due to infrastructure upgrades. Riders can board or exit one stop away, at either Washington Square or Dean Road.
transit.description:
Affected direction: westbound

Affected stations:
Tappan Street

transit.header: Outbound Green Line C Branch trains (toward Cleveland Circle) will not stop at Englewood Avenue through Friday, July 10. Riders can board one stop away at Dean Road and exit at either Dean Road or Cleveland Circle.
transit.description:
Affected direction: westbound

Affected stations:
Englewood Avenue
